design_plan: rng(seed=42)->layout=cinematic_centered; AIDA checked; hero max-width 1120px yields 2–3 lines; bento+compare grids include grid-auto-flow:dense; labels mention Folk, Orchids, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok; button contrast black/white verified
headline: Super vs Orchids — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Orchids. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Orchids

summary: A fair, evidence‑based comparison for people evaluating Super and Orchids. Orchids explores messaging‑first and experimental automation. Super is built for durable computer‑use workflows, with agents that actually operate computers and reuse a computer‑use cache so repeated work gets faster and cheaper over time.
